/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/binary_stream.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/binary_stream_pmc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/buffer_adaptor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/buffer_adaptor_pmc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/buffer_utility.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/dynamic_buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/file_buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/intrusive_storage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/static_buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/tls_block_allocator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/unit_tests.dir/null_buffer.cpp.o -o unit_tests  ../lib/libgtest.a ../lib/libgtest_main.a ../lib/libgtest.a
